match.userMessage:
cinematic still in modern social-first product photography style showing SCARLETT in casual beach attire reaching her hand across a white vanity surface to lift the coral lipstick tube from its open box, fingers tensed mid-grasp as the vibrant bullet begins to twist upward under directional sunlight, open tote bag resting on the studio floor nearby, clean minimal interior with bright window light casting crisp natural shadows across the white surface and glossy tube, high-key airy atmosphere with true-to-life color, shallow depth of field emphasizing the tactile moment of contact, eye-level slightly overhead framing with natural micro-movement energy and crisp whites against the neutral palette

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. VANITY - DAY - White vanity with bright window light
    - Image 3 [ELEMENT REF]: CORAL_LIPSTICK - A slim glossy coral lipstick tube with metallic body and extended vibrant bullet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
